rules.rule: Client PII, personal data, financial records, or confidential material must not be processed by external AI tools without approved contractual, privacy, and engagement controls.
AI-assisted client-facing deliverables require human review by the engagement owner before being sent externally.
Client entertainment over CAD 300 per attendee requires compliance review. CAD 150-300 requires partner approval.
Approved AI tools may be used for drafting, summarization, workflow analysis, and internal ideation with fake, anonymized, or non-confidential information.
Automations that change records, send messages, or access restricted repositories require role-based permissions, logging, and a rollback path.
Uploading raw credentials, secrets, private keys, or unmasked regulated data to unapproved systems is not allowed.
